{{Quote|We can't be afraid of our colleagues forever. We voted to allow former Imperials into the Senate. We have to accept them now.|C-Gosf, seated in the Inner Council|<ref name="The New Rebellion">''[[The New Rebellion]]''</ref>}}
'''C-Gosf''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Gosfambling (species)|Gosfamling]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Gosfambling]] c. [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]]. She was also a member of the Senate's [[Inner Council (New Republic)|Inner Council]]. She ran at great personal risk, because a Gosfamling who failed any contest was forever shunned by other Gosfamlings.

{{Char-stub}}
